recent_decisions.title: Deliberation: find data engineer jobs more than 180k+
recent_decisions.decision: Conduct research on job platforms like LinkedIn, Glassdoor, and Indeed to identify data engineer positions with salaries above $180k. Compile a list of these opportunities, ensuring to include key details and application links. Consider using job alerts or networking strategies to find less visible opportunities.
recent_decisions.reasoning: Objective: Identify high-paying data engineer job opportunities with salaries exceeding $180k.

context_summary: Career growth and data engineering job market engine. Tracks opportunities, salary trends, skill requirements. Focus on senior/staff/principal data engineering roles.
